title: PREGNANCY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: COAST PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, ultrasounds, pro-life counseling, parenting education, material support, and community referrals. 279 6th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 325-9111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 325-9111 Fax (503) 325-2446 text (971) 278-9398 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clatsop County SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm Services: Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COAST PREGNANCY CENTER
